THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FALABRINO, SANDRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 234 LILY STREET, STAYED UNTIL OCT-05-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, STIP TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE JUDGMENT IF DEF. VACATES BY 5- OCT-99. COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION IN EVENT OF BREACH ON EX-PARTE NOTICE.
